title: New Columns and Views
excerpt:
Is it possible to NOT add a new column to every view in a board automatically? 
Very annoying to have to manually toggle visibility in every view every time a new column is added and intended for just one view.

posts.author: celloshred (Michael Wolff)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it possible to NOT add a new column to every view in a board automatically?

Very annoying to have to manually toggle visibility in every view every time a new column is added and intended for just one view.

posts.author: FredW (Frederik Wongel)
posts.cookedHtml:
I was wondering the same thing, is there an Option in the settings somewhere that I have overlooked?
Would appreciate some help.

Kind regards

Fred

posts.author: GaryS (Gary So)
posts.cookedHtml: I find this very frustrating as well since some of our views are shared to the outside world and they don’t need to see the new columns added.

posts.author: avp (Amanda)
posts.cookedHtml: Also extremely interested in this. Some of our boards have a dozen or more views and its quite annoying to go to each of them and unselect the new column(s).

posts.author: oliviaPM (Olivia Scott)
posts.cookedHtml: 100% agree with your frustrations. So many tabs that every time I edit the main table they pop up - seems silly!!!
